data.reasoning: Both models failed to review PKGBUILD (the critical build script) due to erroneous binary file classification, leaving zero files analyzed.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD skipped by both models despite being essential for assessing build/install behavior
No files reviewed at all - critical gap for security assessment
false_negatives: All potential risks in PKGBUILD (network calls, file operations, privilege escalation) were missed
learnings: Fix binary file detection: PKGBUILD should never be classified as binary
Prioritize core files: PKGBUILD must be analyzed first before other files
Implement fallback: When PKGBUILD analysis fails, abort with clear error instead of skipping
Add validation: Check file types against known AUR package patterns during preprocessing
